nasb.text: The sons of Elioenai were Hodaviah, Eliashib, Pelaiah, Akkub, Johanan, Delaiah and Anani, seven.

esv.text: The sons of Elioenai: Hodaviah, Eliashib, Pelaiah, Akkub, Johanan, Delaiah, and Anani, seven.

cnv.text: 以利約乃的兒子是何大雅、以利雅實、毘萊雅、阿谷、約哈難、第來雅、阿拿尼共七人。

ccb.text: 以利约乃的七个儿子是何大雅、以利亚实、毗莱雅、阿谷、约哈难、第莱雅和阿拿尼。
